name: outpost-platform
description: 8-sheet PE platform template (Version Tracker / Assumptions / Financial Statements / Equity / Debt / Valuation / GPP Promote / Cheat Sheet)

mappings._comment: Replace these placeholder cell refs with the actual cells for your deployment. Discover via: ete query <dir> --search 'Gross IRR' --sheet 'Cheat Sheet'

notes: GPP Promote sheet typically has 5 stacked scenario blocks at rows 1-92, 93-184, 185-276, 277-368, 369-460.
carry.totalCell sits on the 'Cheat Sheet' near the IRR/MOIC summary — NOT on GPP Promote!AF25 (that cell is 'Total Cash Flows (pre-carry)').
basisCell is peak equity invested (in $M) — not the '5' label row on Assumptions.
